name: Saudi Exchange ESG Disclosure Guidelines — 29 KPIs

disclosures.name: GHG Emissions
disclosures.description: Total GHG emissions (Scope 1 and Scope 2) in metric tons of CO2 equivalent. Scope 1 covers direct emissions from owned or controlled sources. Scope 2 covers indirect emissions from purchased electricity, steam, heating and cooling.

requiredMetrics.name: Scope 1 GHG emissions
requiredMetrics.description: Direct (Scope 1) GHG emissions from owned or controlled sources

requiredMetrics.name: Scope 2 GHG emissions
requiredMetrics.description: Indirect (Scope 2) GHG emissions from purchased electricity, steam, heating and cooling

requiredMetrics.name: Total GHG emissions (Scope 1+2)
requiredMetrics.description: Sum of Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions

disclosures.guidanceText: Report total Scope 1 and Scope 2 GHG emissions in metric tons of CO2 equivalent using the GHG Protocol methodology. Include all six Kyoto Protocol gases where applicable.

disclosures.name: Emissions Intensity
disclosures.description: GHG emissions per unit of output, revenue, or other organization-specific metric. Calculated as total Scope 1+2 emissions divided by the chosen denominator.

requiredMetrics.name: GHG emissions intensity
requiredMetrics.calculationMethod: Total Scope 1+2 / denominator (e.g., revenue, production, employees)
requiredMetrics.description: GHG emissions intensity ratio

disclosures.guidanceText: Report GHG emission intensity ratio per unit of economic or physical output. Specify the denominator used (revenue in SAR, tonnes of production, employees, etc.).

disclosures.name: Energy Usage
disclosures.description: Total energy consumed within the organization, broken down by renewable and non-renewable sources, in gigajoules (GJ) or megawatt-hours (MWh).

requiredMetrics.name: Total energy consumption
requiredMetrics.description: Total energy consumed within the organization

requiredMetrics.name: Renewable energy consumption
requiredMetrics.description: Energy consumption from renewable sources

requiredMetrics.name: Non-renewable energy consumption
requiredMetrics.description: Energy consumption from non-renewable sources

requiredMetrics.name: Energy intensity
requiredMetrics.description: Energy intensity ratio

disclosures.guidanceText: Report total energy consumption in GJ or MWh, broken down by fuel type and source. Include energy intensity per unit of output or revenue.

disclosures.name: Water Usage
disclosures.description: Total water withdrawn and consumed in megaliters (ML) or cubic meters (m3), including water from stressed areas.

requiredMetrics.name: Total water withdrawal
requiredMetrics.description: Total water withdrawn from all sources

requiredMetrics.name: Total water consumption
requiredMetrics.description: Total water consumed (withdrawn minus discharged)

requiredMetrics.name: Water recycled/reused
requiredMetrics.description: Volume of water recycled or reused

requiredMetrics.name: Water intensity
requiredMetrics.description: Water intensity per unit of output or revenue

disclosures.guidanceText: Report total water withdrawal by source, total water consumption, and water recycled/reused. Given GCC water scarcity, this is a critical metric.

disclosures.name: Waste Generated
disclosures.description: Total waste generated in metric tons, broken down by hazardous and non-hazardous waste, and by disposal method.

requiredMetrics.name: Total waste generated
requiredMetrics.description: Total weight of waste generated

requiredMetrics.name: Hazardous waste
requiredMetrics.description: Total hazardous waste generated

requiredMetrics.name: Non-hazardous waste
requiredMetrics.description: Total non-hazardous waste generated

requiredMetrics.name: Waste diverted from disposal
requiredMetrics.description: Total waste recycled or recovered

requiredMetrics.name: Waste to landfill
requiredMetrics.description: Total waste sent to landfill

disclosures.guidanceText: Report total waste generated broken down by type (hazardous/non-hazardous) and disposal method (recycled, composted, incinerated, landfill).

disclosures.name: Environmental Fines
disclosures.description: Total number and monetary value of environmental fines and penalties during the reporting period.

requiredMetrics.name: Number of environmental fines
requiredMetrics.description: Total number of environmental fines received

requiredMetrics.name: Total value of environmental fines
requiredMetrics.description: Total monetary value of environmental fines

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the number and total value of significant environmental fines and non-monetary sanctions during the reporting period.

disclosures.name: Environmental Operations
disclosures.description: Percentage of operations/activities assessed for environmental risks and impacts, including environmental management systems in place.

requiredMetrics.name: Operations with environmental assessment
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of operations assessed for environmental risks

requiredMetrics.name: Operations with ISO 14001 certification
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of operations with ISO 14001 or equivalent

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the percentage of operations that have been assessed for environmental risks and the percentage with certified environmental management systems.

disclosures.name: Climate Risk Mitigation
disclosures.description: Description of climate-related risks and opportunities, and strategies for climate risk mitigation including adaptation measures.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe climate-related physical and transition risks, opportunities identified, and strategies for mitigation and adaptation. Reference TCFD framework where applicable.

disclosures.name: Environmental Expenditures
disclosures.description: Total amount spent on environmental protection activities and investments during the reporting period.

requiredMetrics.name: Environmental protection expenditure
requiredMetrics.description: Total expenditure on environmental protection

requiredMetrics.name: Environmental investment
requiredMetrics.description: Capital investment in environmental improvements

disclosures.guidanceText: Report total expenditures on environmental protection, pollution prevention, environmental management, and environmental investments.

disclosures.name: Employee Health & Safety
disclosures.description: Occupational health and safety metrics including fatalities, lost-time injury frequency rate (LTIFR), total recordable incident rate (TRIR), and hours worked.

requiredMetrics.name: Work-related fatalities
requiredMetrics.description: Number of work-related fatalities

requiredMetrics.name: Lost-time injuries
requiredMetrics.description: Number of lost-time injuries

requiredMetrics.name: Total recordable incidents
requiredMetrics.description: Total number of recordable work-related incidents

requiredMetrics.name: Hours worked
requiredMetrics.description: Total hours worked by all employees

requiredMetrics.name: LTIFR
requiredMetrics.description: Lost Time Injury Frequency Rate

requiredMetrics.name: TRIR
requiredMetrics.description: Total Recordable Incident Rate

disclosures.guidanceText: Report number of work-related fatalities, lost-time injuries, and total recordable incidents. Calculate and report LTIFR and TRIR. Disclose total hours worked.

disclosures.name: Data Privacy
disclosures.description: Number of data breaches and complaints received concerning breaches of customer privacy and losses of customer data.

requiredMetrics.name: Data breaches
requiredMetrics.description: Total number of identified data breaches

requiredMetrics.name: Privacy complaints
requiredMetrics.description: Number of substantiated complaints about privacy breaches

requiredMetrics.name: Customer data loss incidents
requiredMetrics.description: Number of identified losses of customer data

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the total number of data breaches, substantiated complaints regarding breaches of customer privacy, and identified losses of customer data during the reporting period.

disclosures.name: Employee Training
disclosures.description: Average hours of training per year per employee, broken down by gender and employee category.

requiredMetrics.name: Average training hours per employee
requiredMetrics.description: Average hours of training per employee

requiredMetrics.name: Average training hours - male
requiredMetrics.description: Average training hours for male employees

requiredMetrics.name: Average training hours - female
requiredMetrics.description: Average training hours for female employees

requiredMetrics.name: Training expenditure per employee
requiredMetrics.description: Average training investment per employee

disclosures.guidanceText: Report average training hours per employee per year, broken down by gender and employee category. Report total training expenditure.

disclosures.name: Gender Diversity
disclosures.description: Percentage of female employees in the total workforce and in management positions.

requiredMetrics.name: Female employees
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of female employees in total workforce

requiredMetrics.name: Female in management
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of females in management positions

requiredMetrics.name: Female in senior management
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of females in senior management

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the percentage of female employees in total workforce, management positions, and senior management. This aligns with Saudi Vision 2030 female workforce participation targets.

disclosures.name: Total Employees
disclosures.description: Total number of employees (headcount) broken down by gender, employment type, and contract type.

requiredMetrics.name: Total employees
requiredMetrics.description: Total number of employees

requiredMetrics.name: Male employees
requiredMetrics.description: Number of male employees

requiredMetrics.name: Female employees
requiredMetrics.description: Number of female employees

requiredMetrics.name: Full-time employees
requiredMetrics.description: Number of full-time employees

requiredMetrics.name: Part-time employees
requiredMetrics.description: Number of part-time employees

disclosures.guidanceText: Report total headcount at the end of the reporting period, broken down by gender, employment type (full-time/part-time), and contract type (permanent/temporary).

disclosures.name: Nationalization/Saudization
disclosures.description: Percentage of Saudi nationals in total workforce and in management positions, aligned with Nitaqat program requirements.

requiredMetrics.name: Saudi nationals in workforce
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of Saudi nationals in total workforce

requiredMetrics.name: Saudi nationals in management
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of Saudi nationals in management positions

requiredMetrics.name: Nitaqat band
requiredMetrics.description: Current Nitaqat band classification

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the percentage of Saudi nationals (Saudization rate) in total workforce and management. Disclose current Nitaqat classification band. This is specific to Saudi Vision 2030 workforce nationalization goals.

crossReferences.notes: GRI covers local hiring, Saudi Exchange specifies Saudization

disclosures.name: Employee Turnover
disclosures.description: Total employee turnover rate and voluntary turnover rate, broken down by gender and age group.

requiredMetrics.name: Total turnover rate
requiredMetrics.description: Total employee turnover rate

requiredMetrics.name: Voluntary turnover rate
requiredMetrics.description: Voluntary employee turnover rate

requiredMetrics.name: New hires
requiredMetrics.description: Total number of new employee hires

disclosures.guidanceText: Report total employee turnover rate and voluntary turnover rate. Break down by gender and age group. Report number of new hires.

disclosures.name: Collective Bargaining
disclosures.description: Percentage of employees covered by collective bargaining agreements. Note: In Saudi Arabia, traditional collective bargaining may not apply; report on worker representation mechanisms.

requiredMetrics.name: Collective bargaining coverage
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of employees covered by collective bargaining or equivalent worker committees

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the percentage of employees covered by collective bargaining agreements or, where not applicable, describe alternative worker representation mechanisms in place.

disclosures.name: Gender Pay Gap
disclosures.description: Ratio of basic salary and remuneration of women to men, by employee category.

requiredMetrics.name: Gender pay ratio
requiredMetrics.description: Ratio of female to male basic salary by employee category

requiredMetrics.name: Gender pay gap
requiredMetrics.calculationMethod: ((Male median - Female median) / Male median) x 100
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage difference in median pay between male and female employees

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the ratio of the basic salary and remuneration of women to men for each employee category. Calculate and report the gender pay gap as a percentage.

disclosures.name: Local Procurement
disclosures.description: Percentage of procurement budget spent on local (Saudi-based) suppliers.

requiredMetrics.name: Local procurement percentage
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of procurement budget spent on local suppliers

requiredMetrics.name: Local procurement value
requiredMetrics.description: Total value of procurement from local suppliers

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the percentage of procurement budget spent with local suppliers. Define 'local' as suppliers based in Saudi Arabia. Aligns with Saudi Vision 2030 local content goals.

disclosures.name: Community Investment
disclosures.description: Total value of community investments, including donations, sponsorships, and CSR expenditure.

requiredMetrics.name: Community investment
requiredMetrics.description: Total value of community investments and CSR expenditure

requiredMetrics.name: Community investment as % of net profit
requiredMetrics.description: Community investment as percentage of net profit

disclosures.guidanceText: Report total monetary value of community investments including donations, in-kind giving, sponsorships, and CSR program expenditures. Report as percentage of net profit.

disclosures.name: Human Rights
disclosures.description: Description of human rights due diligence processes and any human rights-related incidents or grievances.

requiredMetrics.name: Human rights assessments conducted
requiredMetrics.description: Number of human rights due diligence assessments

requiredMetrics.name: Human rights grievances filed
requiredMetrics.description: Number of human rights-related grievances filed

disclosures.guidanceText: Describe human rights due diligence processes in place. Report number of human rights assessments conducted and any grievances filed and resolved.

disclosures.name: Board Diversity
disclosures.description: Composition and diversity of the board of directors, including gender, age, independence, and expertise.

requiredMetrics.name: Total board members
requiredMetrics.description: Total number of board members

requiredMetrics.name: Female board members
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of female board members

requiredMetrics.name: Independent board members
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of independent board members

requiredMetrics.name: Board members with ESG expertise
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of board members with ESG knowledge/experience

disclosures.guidanceText: Report total board composition with breakdowns by gender, independence, and ESG expertise. Include age distribution of board members.

disclosures.name: Board ESG Oversight
disclosures.description: Description of the board's role in overseeing ESG risks and opportunities, including dedicated committees.

requiredMetrics.name: ESG committee exists
requiredMetrics.description: Whether a dedicated ESG/sustainability committee exists at board level

disclosures.guidanceText: Describe the board-level oversight of ESG matters, including whether a dedicated ESG committee exists, frequency of ESG reviews, and board ESG training.

disclosures.name: CEO Pay Ratio
disclosures.description: Ratio of CEO total compensation to median employee compensation.

requiredMetrics.name: CEO total compensation
requiredMetrics.description: Total annual compensation of the CEO

requiredMetrics.name: Median employee compensation
requiredMetrics.description: Median annual total compensation of all employees

requiredMetrics.name: CEO pay ratio
requiredMetrics.calculationMethod: CEO total compensation / Median employee compensation
requiredMetrics.description: Ratio of CEO to median employee pay

disclosures.guidanceText: Report the ratio of the CEO's annual total compensation to the median annual total compensation of all employees.

disclosures.name: Tax Transparency
disclosures.description: Total tax paid by jurisdiction, effective tax rate, and approach to tax governance.

requiredMetrics.name: Total tax paid
requiredMetrics.description: Total corporate tax paid

requiredMetrics.name: Effective tax rate
requiredMetrics.description: Effective corporate tax rate

requiredMetrics.name: Zakat paid
requiredMetrics.description: Total Zakat paid (Saudi-specific)

disclosures.guidanceText: Report total taxes paid including corporate income tax and Zakat (for Saudi entities). Disclose effective tax rate and approach to tax governance.

disclosures.name: Ethics & Anti-Corruption
disclosures.description: Description of anti-corruption policies, training provided, and confirmed incidents of corruption.

requiredMetrics.name: Anti-corruption policy exists
requiredMetrics.description: Whether a formal anti-corruption policy exists

requiredMetrics.name: Employees trained on anti-corruption
requiredMetrics.description: Percentage of employees who received anti-corruption training

requiredMetrics.name: Confirmed corruption incidents
requiredMetrics.description: Number of confirmed incidents of corruption

requiredMetrics.name: Whistleblower reports received
requiredMetrics.description: Number of whistleblower reports received

disclosures.guidanceText: Report on anti-corruption policies, percentage of employees trained, confirmed incidents of corruption, and whistleblower mechanism utilization.

disclosures.name: ESG Reporting
disclosures.description: Whether the organization publishes a standalone ESG/sustainability report, frameworks used, and assurance status.

requiredMetrics.name: Standalone ESG report published
requiredMetrics.description: Whether a standalone ESG report is published

requiredMetrics.name: Frameworks applied
requiredMetrics.description: List of ESG frameworks used in reporting

requiredMetrics.name: External assurance obtained
requiredMetrics.description: Whether external assurance was obtained on ESG data

disclosures.guidanceText: Report whether a standalone ESG/sustainability report is published, which frameworks are applied (GRI, ISSB, etc.), and whether external assurance has been obtained.

disclosures.name: Sustainability Governance Structure
disclosures.description: Description of the organizational governance structure for managing sustainability, including roles and responsibilities.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe the governance structure for sustainability management, including dedicated roles, reporting lines, and integration with overall corporate governance.

disclosures.name: Stakeholder Engagement
disclosures.description: Description of stakeholder engagement approach, key stakeholder groups, and how their input informs ESG strategy.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe the approach to stakeholder engagement, identify key stakeholder groups, and explain how stakeholder input informs the ESG strategy and materiality assessment.
